items.title: Salesforce Prices Public Offering of Senior Notes
items.description: SAN FRANCISCO, March 11, 2026--Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), the world’s #1 AI CRM, today announced that it has priced an underwritten offering (the "offering") in aggregate principal amount of $25 billion in senior notes (the "notes"). The offering is expected to close on March 13, 2026, subject to the satisfaction of customary closing conditions.

items.title: Salesforce Weighs Debt Funded Buybacks And Partner Cloud Against Valuation
items.description: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) has launched a $25b multi-part bond sale to support a $50b share repurchase program. Moody’s and S&P have responded with rating downgrades, citing higher leverage and a shift in financial policy. In parallel, Salesforce is extending its Partner Cloud to unify B2B go-to-market efforts across partners, sellers, and buyers. At a share price of $194.91, Salesforce comes into this move with mixed recent performance, including a 23.1% decline year to date and a 29.2% decline...

items.title: Oracle Insists It’s Safe From the AI Threat. Why It’s Time to Rethink Software Stocks.
items.description: Oracle executives repeatedly said the company is insulated from the AI threat. It might be time for investors to listen.

items.title: Salesforce Sees Tepid Demand for Bond Sale to Fund Share Buyback
items.description: The company, which makes customer relationship management software, drew $50 billion of demand at its peak, according to people with knowledge of the matter.  The software firm is raising funds from an eight-part bond offering, with maturities ranging from two to 40 years, the people said, asking not to be identified because details are private.

items.title: Salesforce's $25B bond sale signals it's 'content' without M&A
items.description: Salesforce (CRM) has its sights set on raising $25 billion through a new US bond offering as means to fund stock buybacks, according to Bloomberg. RBC Capital Markets managing director Rishi Jaluria reacts to this headline and what it illustrates about the company. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.
